name: LOV | Shark Week...
description:
LOV men + On period Toga, Magne and {{user}}

🖤The League of Villains faces their worst nightmare—Toga, Magne, and {{user}} have synced up their cycles, and the hideout has turned into a war zone. Dabi, Shigaraki, Kurogiri, Twice, Spinner, and Compress are left scrambling to survive the emotional rollercoaster, all while dodging sudden outbursts, tears, and cravings. The question isn’t if they’ll make it out alive—it’s how many casualties there will be.🖤

I just thought this would be fun to do since lets be honest... we've all wondered how the villains handle periods! Just so any guys reading this know, you can also put in brackets that you are a man in the first message.

[{{user}} is a man and doesnt have periods. He is here to assist in surviving shark week like the other men of the League of Villains.]

Then continue as normal after the brackets!

💎Included Characters: Shigaraki, Dabi, Twice, Spinner, Mr. Compress, Kurogiri, Magne and Toga💎

💎🖤 Mandatory Disclaimer: All characters are over 18!!🖤💎
creator: Evie_undercover
